mapper.select: SELECT option_id, option_name, option_price, option_image, option_is_available FROM options ORDER BY option_id DESC
SELECT option_id, option_name, option_price, option_image, option_is_available FROM options WHERE option_id = #{optionId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO options ( option_name, option_price, option_image, option_is_available ) VALUES ( #{optionName}, #{optionPrice}, #{optionImage}, #{optionIsAvailable} )
mapper.update: UPDATE options SET option_name = #{optionName}, option_price = #{optionPrice}, option_image = #{optionImage}, option_is_available = #{optionIsAvailable} WHERE option_id = #{optionId}
